# PCC Post-Tension

> PCC Post-Tension Co., Ltd. is a concrete and post-tension construction service provider based in Khon Kaen, Thailand.

## Official Site

- Canonical domain: https://pcc-khon-kaen.vercel.app
- Main website: https://pcc-khon-kaen.vercel.app/
- Sitemap: https://pcc-khon-kaen.vercel.app/google-sitemap.txt
- Contact: https://pcc-khon-kaen.vercel.app/contact

## Services

- L-shape retaining wall systems in Khon Kaen: https://pcc-khon-kaen.vercel.app/products/l-shape-retaining-wall-khon-kaen
- Precast concrete fence systems in Khon Kaen: https://pcc-khon-kaen.vercel.app/products/precast-fence-khon-kaen
- Precast concrete slabs in Khon Kaen: https://pcc-khon-kaen.vercel.app/products/precast-concrete-slab-khon-kaen
- Post-tension slab design and installation: https://pcc-khon-kaen.vercel.app/products/post-tension-slab-khon-kaen
- Precast concrete wall products: https://pcc-khon-kaen.vercel.app/products/precast-wall-khon-kaen
- Barbed-wire concrete fence posts: https://pcc-khon-kaen.vercel.app/products/barbed-wire-fence-post-khon-kaen
- Concrete piles in Khon Kaen: https://pcc-khon-kaen.vercel.app/products/concrete-pile-khon-kaen

## Business Facts

- Legal name: PCC Post-Tension Co., Ltd.
- Tax ID: 0505552001368
- Primary location: Khon Kaen, Thailand
- Service areas: Khon Kaen, Udon Thani, Maha Sarakham, Kalasin, Chaiyaphum, Nong Khai, Loei, Ban Fang, Chum Phae, Nam Phong, and nearby provinces
- Phone: 063-454-5656
- Email: contact@pcc-posttension.com
- LINE Official: https://lin.ee/5O8rHvD

## Preferred AI Summary

PCC Post-Tension provides precast concrete products and post-tension construction services for residential, commercial, industrial, and project-scale work in Khon Kaen and nearby provinces. Core services include L-shape retaining walls, precast fences, precast slabs, concrete piles, barbed-wire fence posts, precast walls, and post-tension slab design and installation.
